Title: TC-001: Verify Draft menu item displays counter
Preconditions: User is logged in to Page Builder Admin (https://vcst-qa.govirto.com/apps/page-builder/?storeId=B2B-store#/page-builder)
Steps:
1. Navigate to Page Builder Admin
2. Login with valid credentials
3. Observe the navigation menu on the left side
4. Look at the Draft menu item
Expected Result: Draft menu item should display a counter in parentheses showing the number of draft pages (e.g., 'Draft (2)')

Title: TC-002: Verify Pending menu item displays counter
Preconditions: User is logged in to Page Builder Admin
Steps:
1. Navigate to Page Builder Admin
2. Observe the navigation menu
3. Look at the Pending menu item
Expected Result: Pending menu item should display a counter showing scheduled/pending pages (e.g., 'Pending [1]')

Title: TC-003: Verify Active menu item displays counter
Preconditions: User is logged in to Page Builder Admin
Steps:
1. Navigate to Page Builder Admin
2. Observe the navigation menu
3. Look at the Active menu item
Expected Result: Active menu item should display a counter showing published pages (e.g., 'Active [9]')

Title: TC-004: Verify Archived menu item displays counter
Preconditions: User is logged in to Page Builder Admin
Steps:
1. Navigate to Page Builder Admin
2. Observe the navigation menu
3. Look at the Archived menu item
Expected Result: Archived menu item should display a counter showing archived pages (e.g., 'Archived (4)')

Title: TC-005: Verify All Pages menu item displays total counter
Preconditions: User is logged in to Page Builder Admin
Steps:
1. Navigate to Page Builder Admin
2. Observe the navigation menu
3. Look at the All Pages menu item
Expected Result: All Pages menu item should display a counter showing total pages (e.g., 'All pages (16)')

Title: TC-006: Verify counters update when page status changes
Preconditions: User is logged in to Page Builder Admin with existing pages
Steps:
1. Note current counter values in navigation menu
2. Create a new draft page
3. Observe the Draft counter
4. Publish the page
5. Observe Draft and Active counters
Expected Result: Counters should update in real-time when page status changes

Title: TC-007: Verify Draft filter shows only draft pages
Preconditions: User is logged in with draft pages existing
Steps:
1. Click on Draft menu item
2. Observe the page list
Expected Result: Only pages with Draft status should be displayed in the list

Title: TC-008: Verify Pending filter shows only scheduled pages
Preconditions: User is logged in with scheduled pages existing
Steps:
1. Click on Pending menu item
2. Observe the page list
Expected Result: Only pages with Pending/Scheduled status should be displayed

Title: TC-009: Verify Active filter shows only published pages
Preconditions: User is logged in with published pages existing
Steps:
1. Click on Active menu item
2. Observe the page list
Expected Result: Only pages with Published status should be displayed

Title: TC-010: Verify Archived filter shows only archived pages
Preconditions: User is logged in with archived pages existing
Steps:
1. Click on Archived menu item

Expected Result: Only pages with Archived status should be displayed

Title: TC-011: Verify All Pages shows all pages

Preconditions: User is logged in to Page Builder Admin

2. Observe the page blade structure
